summary: While the role provides the predictable Monday-Friday daytime hours you desire, the high stress and extreme burnout risk make it an unsustainable choice for your personal wellbeing. Most significantly, the requirement for advanced statistical analysis and deductive reasoning is a direct mismatch for your strengths in procedural and protocol-driven work. Furthermore, the constant emotional labor of managing interpersonal conflict as a compliance enforcer would likely lead to rapid exhaustion in this high-stakes environment.
